ideation: This sequence simulates a celebratory arm raise upon winning first place.  The animation starts with arms at the sides, then raises one arm in a celebratory arc, and finishes with both arms raised. The use of the two shoulder joints allows for a natural-looking arc in the arm's motion. The left arm remains relatively static to provide a contrast and to balance the robot’s motion.  The right arm will be the focus of the celebratory movement.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, awaiting victory
the right arm shoots up in a triumphant gesture
both arms are raised high in celebration
